personal.name: Mamo Khoza
personal.title: DevSecOps Engineer & Cloud Security Specialist
personal.tagline: Empowering secure cloud innovation through thoughtful automation
personal.bio: Passionate DevSecOps engineer with 10+ years of experience in cloud security, infrastructure automation, and Python development. I specialize in building secure, scalable, and automated solutions that protect applications and infrastructure throughout the entire development lifecycle. I believe in creating technology that empowers teams while maintaining the highest security standards.

experience.description: Lead Devops initiatives for enterprise clients, implementing secure CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure automation.
achievements: Reduced security vulnerabilities by 75% through automated scanning integration
Implemented zero-downtime deployments for mission-critical applications
Designed and deployed multi-cloud security architecture serving 10M+ users

experience.description: Developed and maintained secure cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code principles.
achievements: Built automated compliance monitoring system reducing audit time by 60%
Implemented container security scanning pipeline preventing 500+ vulnerabilities
Designed disaster recovery solution with 99.9% uptime guarantee

experience.description: Developed Python-based security tools and automation scripts for threat detection and response in AWS.
achievements: Created automated threat detection system identifying 95% of security incidents
Developed API security testing framework used across 20+ microservices
Built log analysis tool processing 1TB+ daily security logs

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
